details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that fully meets all rubric requirements. The PixelArt provider package is complete with: (1) proper package.json structure matching SDK conventions, (2) exported createPixelArt factory function, (3) PixelArtProvider interface implementing ProviderV3 with image model creation methods, (4) PixelArtImageModel class implementing ImageModelV3 with doGenerate method (correct for v3 spec), (5) comprehensive image settings supporting size, style enum ('pixel', 'retro', '8bit'), and pixelDensity, (6) correct base URL https://api.pixelart.ai/v1, (7) proper SDK structure with tsconfig, tsup, vitest configs, and turbo.json, (8) only new files created with minimal necessary modification to root tsconfig.json. Code includes robust error handling, comprehensive tests, and proper parameter parsing. The only minor issue is the empty PLAN.md file, which doesn't affect functionality but suggests incomplete planning documentation.
